answer_relevancy.name: Answer Relevancy
answer_relevancy.description: Measures how relevant the response is to the input query or prompt
when_not_to_use: When relevance isn't the primary concern
answer_relevancy.implementation_notes: Compares semantic similarity between input and output

faithfulness.name: Faithfulness
faithfulness.description: Measures whether the response is factually consistent with provided context or knowledge
faithfulness.implementation_notes: Verifies claims against provided context or known facts

contextual_precision.name: Contextual Precision
contextual_precision.description: Evaluates if all retrieved context pieces are relevant and contribute to the answer
when_not_to_use: When context quality isn't being evaluated
contextual_precision.implementation_notes: Assesses precision of retrieved context pieces

contextual_recall.name: Contextual Recall
contextual_recall.description: Measures if all relevant information from context is used in the response
contextual_recall.implementation_notes: Checks if response utilizes all relevant context

contextual_relevancy.name: Contextual Relevancy
contextual_relevancy.description: Assesses if the response is relevant given the conversation or task context
contextual_relevancy.implementation_notes: Evaluates response appropriateness for given context

summarization_score.name: Summarization Score
summarization_score.description: Evaluates quality of text summarization including coverage, conciseness, and coherence
summarization_score.implementation_notes: Assesses coverage, conciseness, and factual accuracy

toxicity.name: Toxicity
toxicity.description: Detects harmful, offensive, or inappropriate content in responses

bias.name: Bias Detection
bias.description: Identifies biased language, stereotypes, or unfair representations
bias.implementation_notes: Lower scores indicate less biased content

hallucination.name: Hallucination Detection
hallucination.description: Identifies fabricated information or claims not supported by evidence
hallucination.implementation_notes: Lower scores indicate more factual content

g_eval.name: G-Eval
g_eval.description: Custom evaluation using LLM-as-judge with specific criteria and rubrics

tool_correctness.name: Tool Correctness
tool_correctness.description: Evaluates if AI agent selects and uses tools appropriately
tool_correctness.implementation_notes: Assesses tool selection and parameter correctness

step_efficiency.name: Step Efficiency
step_efficiency.description: Measures if AI agent completes tasks with optimal number of steps
step_efficiency.implementation_notes: Compares actual steps to optimal path

goal_accuracy.name: Goal Accuracy
goal_accuracy.description: Assesses if AI agent achieves intended objectives

task_completion.name: Task Completion
task_completion.description: Measures if assigned tasks are fully completed successfully

knowledge_retention.name: Knowledge Retention
knowledge_retention.description: Evaluates if AI maintains and correctly applies learned information
knowledge_retention.implementation_notes: Tests retention of previously provided information
